hero.headline: Precision Delivery. Intelligent Tracking.
hero.subheadline: Track every shipment in real time with the most advanced private courier intelligence platform ever built.
hero.placeholder: Enter your tracking number, for example EDP-2026-000001

features.subtitle: Every feature engineered for complete visibility, absolute security, and unmatched speed.

tracking.title: Real Time Tracking
tracking.description: Live status updates at every stage of your shipment journey with millisecond precision.

global.title: Global Coverage
global.description: Our network spans 180 countries ensuring your package reaches every corner of the world.

secure.title: Secure Delivery
secure.description: Military grade encryption protects your shipment data and personal information at every layer.

express.title: Express Solutions
express.description: Same day, next day, and overnight delivery options for time critical shipments worldwide.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Intelligence
enterprise.description: Scalable logistics infrastructure designed to grow from one shipment to one million.

routing.title: Smart Routing
routing.description: Optimized routing finds the fastest and most reliable path for every package we handle.

how.title: Track Your Shipment in Three Steps.
how.subtitle: The simplest tracking experience ever built for a courier platform.

step1.title: Receive Your Tracking Number
step1.description: When your shipment is created by our operations team, you receive a unique EDP tracking number. This is your key to complete shipment visibility from creation to delivery.

step2.title: Enter It Above
step2.description: Paste your EDP tracking number into our intelligent search interface. Our system instantly locates your shipment anywhere in the world, no matter which stage it is in.

step3.title: Follow Every Milestone
step3.description: Watch your package progress through every stage of its international journey with live updates, precise location data, and accurate estimated delivery times.

services.title: Comprehensive Courier Solutions.
services.subtitle: Whether you ship a document across the city or freight across continents, we have the perfect solution.

express.title: Express Delivery
express.description: Guaranteed fast delivery with priority handling at every hub along the route.

freight.title: International Freight
freight.description: Customs cleared cross border shipping with full duty calculation and documentation support.

sameDay.title: Same Day Courier
sameDay.description: Local dispatch within the hour for urgent documents and time sensitive goods.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Logistics
enterprise.description: Dedicated infrastructure, account management, and custom integrations for large scale shippers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about EDP Courier.

trackPage.title: Track Your Shipment.
trackPage.subtitle: Enter your EDP tracking number to see real time status and complete journey history.

notFound.heading: No Shipment Found.
notFound.body: We could not find a shipment matching the tracking number {id}. Please verify your number and try again.
notFound.help: Need help? Contact our support team.
